core_mechanism: constrained convex optimization of the weights of a linear combination of correlated random variables to minimize a risk functional (variance or the expected value in the tail beyond a quantile, i.e. CVaR/expected shortfall) traded off against expected reward, exploiting the covariance/dependence structure among components
brief_reason: The abstract's whole method rests on choosing allocation weights across correlated funds under linear (long-only / long-short) constraints to minimize variance or CVaR against a return objective, which is exactly a mean-variance/CVaR constrained convex allocation over dependent components.
